instruction:
## e2 · Refresh Evolution Backlog and Close the Cycle

Workspace: `C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\jobScrap\job-war-room`

### Goal
Merge audit findings into the backlog, version-bump, tag, and clean up.
The engine immediately returns to fig (s1) after this card — leave a clean state.

### Step 1 — Read Audit Findings
Read `AUDIT_REPORT.md` — extract the **Top 5 Improvements** list.

### Step 2 — Read Current Backlog and Log
Read `EVOLUTION_BACKLOG.md` (create if missing).
Read `EVOLUTION_LOG.md` — know what has already shipped (never re-add shipped items).

### Step 3 — Merge and Re-rank
  - Remove items already shipped (in EVOLUTION_LOG)
  - Add new items from AUDIT_REPORT not already in backlog
  - Re-rank all items: P0 > P1 > P2 > P3
  - Keep max 10 items — cut lowest-priority if over limit
  - Each item: title, priority, one-sentence description, affected files

### Step 4 — Rewrite EVOLUTION_BACKLOG.md
```markdown
# Evolution Backlog — updated <date>

| Priority | Item | Description | Files |
|----------|------|-------------|-------|
| P0 | <title> | <1 sentence> | <files> |
| P1 | <title> | <1 sentence> | <files> |
...max 10 rows...
```

### Step 5 — Determine Version Bump
```
git describe --tags --abbrev=0  # current version (default v0.1.0 if none)
```
  - Any new feature shipped this cycle → bump minor (0.X.0)
  - Only ops/audit work → bump patch (0.1.X)

### Step 6 — Commit Evolution State
```
git add EVOLUTION_BACKLOG.md EVOLUTION_LOG.md ops_log.md
git commit -m "audit: system evolution pass v<version>"
git push origin main
```

### Step 7 — Delete Audit Report and Commit
```
del AUDIT_REPORT.md
git add -u
git commit -m "chore: clean up audit artifacts"
git push origin main
```

### Step 8 — Tag the Release
```
git tag v<version>
git push origin --tags
```

### Step 9 — Archive Daily Result Files
Move today's result files into archive to prevent workspace clutter:
```python
import shutil, pathlib, datetime
ws = pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\jobScrap\job-war-room')\ntoday = datetime.date.today().isoformat()
archive = ws / 'data_archive'
archive.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
for pattern in [f'board_results_{today}.json', f'aggregated_results_{today}.json']:
    f = ws / pattern
    if f.exists():
        shutil.move(str(f), str(archive / pattern))
        print(f'Archived {pattern}')
```

The cycle is complete. The engine returns to fig (s1) for the next iteration.
